title: Driver Available Trips Filtering and Smart Ordering

requirements.text: Update backend getRequestedTrips function to filter trips for driver's Available Trips section using ALL 7 criteria: (1) trip.status == "requested", (2) driver.isAvailable == true, (3) if driver.isVerified field exists then require driver.isVerified == true otherwise skip this check, (4) driver is NOT currently on an active trip (no trips assigned to driver with status in: "accepted", "driver_arriving", "arrived", "on_trip"), (5) trip.pickupPincode == driver.servicePincode, (6) trip.vehicleType is included in driver.vehicleExperience array, (7) trip.transmissionType is included in driver.transmissionComfort array

quotes: Available Trips must show ONLY trips where: 1. trip.status = "requested" 2. driver.isAvailable = true 3. driver.isVerified = true (if exists, otherwise ignore) 4. driver is NOT currently on active trip 5. trip.pickupPincode == driver.servicePincode 6. trip.vehicleType is included in driver.vehicleExperience array 7. trip.transmissionType is included in driver.transmissionComfort array

acceptanceCriteria: Backend getRequestedTrips function filters trips by status == "requested"
Function checks driver.isAvailable == true before returning trips
Function checks driver.isVerified == true if the field exists in UserProfile, otherwise skips this check
Function verifies driver has no active trips with status "accepted", "driver_arriving", "arrived", or "on_trip"
Function filters trips where trip.pickupPincode matches driver.servicePincode exactly
Function filters trips where trip.vehicleType is contained in driver.vehicleExperience array
Function filters trips where trip.transmissionType is contained in driver.transmissionComfort array
Only trips matching ALL 7 criteria are returned to driver

requirements.text: Implement smart ordering logic in backend getRequestedTrips function: trips where trip.pickupAreaName contains driver.serviceAreaName (case-insensitive substring match) should appear FIRST, followed by other same-pincode trips that passed all filtering criteria

quotes: Smart Ordering: - Trips where trip.pickupAreaName matches driver.serviceAreaName (case-insensitive contains match) appear FIRST - Other same-pincode trips appear BELOW

acceptanceCriteria: Backend performs case-insensitive substring match checking if trip.pickupAreaName contains driver.serviceAreaName
Trips with matching area names are sorted to appear first in the returned array
Other trips that passed filtering criteria appear below the area-matched trips
Ordering is consistent and deterministic across multiple requests

requirements.text: Update frontend AvailableTripsSection component to display filtered and ordered trips from backend without any additional client-side filtering, maintaining existing UI layout and trip card display format

quotes: Only update Available Trips filtering and ordering.

acceptanceCriteria: AvailableTripsSection component renders trips returned from backend getRequestedTrips hook
No additional filtering logic is added in the frontend component
Existing trip card layout, pickup/dropoff display, and timestamp formatting remain unchanged
Loading and empty states continue to work correctly

constraints: Do NOT implement accept or reject trip functionality
Do NOT modify customer pages, forms, or logic
Do NOT modify admin dashboard or admin functions
Do NOT add rejection logs or new database tables
Only update Driver Dashboard Available Trips section backend filtering and frontend display
Do NOT change the existing Accept button behavior or UI in AvailableTripsSection
Maintain single-actor Motoko architecture in backend/main.mo
Do NOT modify frontend read-only paths: useInternetIdentity, useActor, main.tsx, components/ui
nonGoals: Modifying customer booking flow or forms
Changing admin dashboard or user/trip management
Adding new database tables or collections
Changing My Trips section for drivers
Adding new trip statuses beyond existing ones
